headline: Days old, not weeks old. You'll taste the difference.
subhead: Regenerative beef, pasture-raised chicken, wild-caught salmon. Delivered to your door.
hero_copy: Real food from real farms. Browse the products FarmThru delivers from regenerative farms to your kitchen.

sections.heading: What's in the box
sections.body: Rachel's Farm Beef Box: 100% grass-fed. No hormones. No antibiotics. Pasture-Raised Chicken: Free range. Slow grown. The way chicken should taste. Wild-Caught Salmon: Wild-caught Alaskan salmon. Never farmed. Bundarra Berkshire Sausages: Heritage breed. Outdoor raised. Small batch.

sections.heading: Know what you're eating.
sections.body: Supermarket beef: 14-21 days in cold storage. Feedlot finished. 2,400km average journey. Bulk processed. FarmThru beef: 2-3 days paddock to door. 100% grass-fed. Regenerative farming. Hand-packed at Brookvale.

sections.heading: Customer testimonial
sections.body: "My kids can taste the difference. And I love knowing the farmers are getting a fair price." — James, Northern Beaches

sections.heading: Farm to kitchen in three steps.
sections.body: Browse the 50+ farm partners. We pack fresh from Brookvale. Delivered to your door. Delivering across Sydney, Central Coast, and Wollongong.

sections.heading: Get first access to invest.
sections.body: Place a refundable $5 deposit to secure VIP status. Fully refundable at any time. This is not financial advice. A disclosure document will be available on Birchal.

creative_brief: Full-bleed salmon close-up hero. Product grid below fold. Side-by-side comparison table.
